title: Copy and Paste Formatting in Docs
excerpt: Ability to copy and paste formatting in Monday Docs. Copy and pasting headers and need to re-format each one individually is a pain if not using the standard headings. Alternatively, setting and saving custom formats wou…

posts.author: kdemotts (kristen.demotts@arrowfinishing.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to copy and paste formatting in Monday Docs. Copy and pasting headers and need to re-format each one individually is a pain if not using the standard headings. Alternatively, setting and saving custom formats would also be effective.

posts.author: IDreamdev (IDream Development)
posts.cookedHtml:
I second that!

Such a very simple but very effective productivity feature that limits redundancy in formatting.

Additionally, would love to see a multi select option like Google and Microsoft has.

-IDT

posts.author: willt (WillT)
posts.cookedHtml: this is mission critical if monday.com is going to be viable for tech projects imo
